home.heroSubtitle: At Bhenauto, you'll find only carefully selected premium vehicles, backed by transparency and craftsmanship. From purchase to service — we handle every detail.

reviews.name: Amandine Gaullet
reviews.quote: "I bought a vehicle at a very fair price, quick response on their part, the purchase and inspection went smoothly, the car runs great with no issues at all — highly recommend! 🤗 On top of that we agreed on redoing the brakes at a very fair price, with an appointment in less than a week!"

reviews.name: Imad
reviews.quote: "A big thank you to all the Bhen auto teams for their welcome and service. Very professional, friendly, respectful of commitments... whether for the purchase of a vehicle or just for a service (quality/price), I recommend them to everyone and will personally come back!"

reviews.name: Atelier114
reviews.quote: "I bought my car at Bhenauto and I am completely satisfied! The team is very professional, attentive and transparent from start to finish. The vehicle matched the listing, was clean and ready to go. A quality service I recommend without hesitation."

reviews.name: Maria Roque
reviews.quote: "I bought a car here — the showroom is well kept, the service is excellent, and the car is in perfect condition. Highly recommend!!!"

whyChooseUs.sectionSubtitle: Passion, precision and professionalism — for every client, for every car.

cards.title:
Premium
Selection
cards.body: Carefully curated premium pre-owned vehicles. Every car in our stock undergoes a rigorous quality inspection for maximum reliability and peace of mind.

cards.title:
Expert
Workshop
cards.body: Expert bodywork repair, maintenance and restoration using the latest equipment and certified technicians.

cards.title:
Years of
Experience
cards.body: Over 15 years of passion for premium vehicles. Our expertise and client satisfaction speak for themselves.

inventory.pageSubtitle: Discover premium pre-owned vehicles, maintained to the highest standards. Experience performance and luxury.
inventory.noResultsBody: We currently have no vehicles matching your specific criteria.
inventory.personalBody: We can source the specific model you are looking for.

werkplaats.heroSubtitle: Our experts combine passion with precision. From diagnostics to bodywork, we treat every vehicle as a masterpiece.

services.title: Maintenance
services.body: Preventive maintenance performed with surgical precision using original components.

services.title: Bodywork
services.body: Expert metalwork and flawless paint restoration that honours the original design language of your vehicle.

services.title: Diagnostics
services.body: State-of-the-art telemetry decodes your engine's signals before they become problems.

services.title: Technical Inspection
services.body: Full pre-check and preparation for your vehicle's MOT inspection. Nothing is left to chance.

services.title: Repairs
services.body: Mechanical and electronic repairs by certified technicians.

werkplaats.trustBadge1Body: We fully stand behind our paintwork and damage repair with comprehensive coverage.
werkplaats.trustBadge2Body: Strict adherence to manufacturer specifications using original parts.
werkplaats.trustBadge3Body: Advanced spectrophotometer technology for a perfect factory finish.
